title: Implement a crop regulation program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a crop regulation program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for the crop regulation program

pcs.text: Identify and confirm with supervisor the crop to be regulated and operational requirements of the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm with supervisor the crop to be regulated and operational requirements of the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm with supervisor the crop to be regulated and operational requirements of the program.

pcs.text: Select, tools, equipment and machinery appropriate for the crop to be regulated, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, tools, equipment and machinery appropriate for the crop to be regulated, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, tools, equipment and machinery appropriate for the crop to be regulated, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with regulating crop, and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with regulating crop, and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with regulating crop, and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to the task and workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to the task and workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to the task and workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate and adjust tools, equipment and machinery.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for the crop regulation program

elements.title: Communicate and monitor crop regulation activities

pcs.text: Inform work teams and contractors of the operational requirements of the regulation program and strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform work teams and contractors of the operational requirements of the regulation program and strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform work teams and contractors of the operational requirements of the regulation program and strategy.

pcs.text: Communicate daily work tasks to work teams and contractors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate daily work tasks to work teams and contractors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate daily work tasks to work teams and contractors.

pcs.text: Monitor crop regulation tasks and undertake remedial action where necessary to achieve program objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor crop regulation tasks and undertake remedial action where necessary to achieve program objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor crop regulation tasks and undertake remedial action where necessary to achieve program objectives.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Communicate and monitor crop regulation activities

elements.title: Undertake crop regulation

pcs.text: Evaluate crop growth and identify plant material to be thinned or pruned
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate crop growth and identify plant material to be thinned or pruned?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate crop growth and identify plant material to be thinned or pruned.

pcs.text: Regulate crop using techniques appropriate to crop requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Regulate crop using techniques appropriate to crop requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Regulate crop using techniques appropriate to crop requirements.

pcs.text: Operate crop regulation tools, equipment and machinery safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate crop regulation tools, equipment and machinery safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate crop regulation tools, equipment and machinery safely.

pcs.text: Record and report signs of diseases and pests according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report signs of diseases and pests according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report signs of diseases and pests according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Undertake crop regulation

elements.title: Complete crop regulation activities

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and return tools, equipment and machinery to required location.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report crop regulation activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report crop regulation activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report crop regulation activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete crop regulation activities

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
